also I know ppl will try to crucify me on spot for this, but are you sure about running dreams on Salvador? You got Thais already to make extra cards. A covenant with extra damage could work too if he really does all your damage lol
well i think salv is less about dealing damage and more about scaling that damage
the more u convert the more damage you'll be doing
stacking my deck with a bajillion end of sufferings with the lone seed is the method

oh, so you are stacking them already. Then an extra copy from dreams makes even less of an impact. Having a covenant with crit damage will amplify all of that damage at once, so if you copy more cards I assume it would be more effective to boost all them as well
that does make more sense actually
i suppose just one more end of suffering wouldn't add much

<:T_stare:1400771751650136145> what wheels for cassia
casiah is a flex slot, you can put whatever on her that other people arent carrying
the meta team she's used in is corpo aftershock
so you could toss utility wheels like dusk and dawn on her
if you don't already have somebody holding keyflare gear, she can be your keyflare bot
she can also carry stuff like tinct wheel or Sever and Scar to take advantage of telekinesis counting as strike
she generates a lot of self aliemus with poof, so you could give her To My Dearest Friend for team buff
that kind of thing

embeds.title: Niko's Event Unlock Recommendations
embeds.description: Since the in-game side story list is not in chronological order, this is a spoiler-free list of side stories I recommend to those interested in the lore of Morimens to read and in what order.  This list is also a spoiler-free companion list to my (spoiler full) Morimens timeline project, where I ...

save the protoparadises, use your standard pulls to pull on standard character banner
get a bit of every banner

And Aigis as well
aigis is free so
mkay
what should i do after that?
ok, so after you clear up to something like chapter 5
you will be swimming in pure cores
use them to pull on ultra banner first, then once you get a few ultra characters switch to aequor, and then finally to chaos
goal is to have a mix of everybody
then you can either use protoparadise to select whatever you didnt pull
or you can invest in specific characters if you like them/plan to use them

the characters who are definitely useful at endgame are

tinct, winkle, jenkin, casiah
caecus, sanga, celeste, goliath, faros
faint
karen
Sanga is kinda borderline because she sucks at zero copies but she becomes good at +4
the rest are used as supports in various comps
yeah I'm screenshoting this and read it for later
i got a sudden headache
which one is ultra banner?
characters that actually benefit from multiple copies: sanga, caecus, winkle, jenkin, tinct, in order from most to least benefit
purple
the standard character banner is called realm studies or something like that
and it lets you switch which realm you want to pull
oh i see
I don't need to pull on caro right? since I already have a bit of them?
i dont recommend it because the only one that is really useful at endgame is faint
and she only needs one copy to be good
the rest fall off and are just outclassed by other options
so unless you really really like agrippa or something
mkay
Aequor is a weird situation where they all fit into one team together and are useless outside of that one team
and it also kinda sorta falls off in endgame unless you have gmurphy
Anyway i wouldnt stress too much over pulling standard character banner, you will get a whole pile of standard characters by accident when rolling for limited characters
so once you have "enough" of the good characters you can stop
and start pulling for wheels instead
noted
I'm interested in this character called doll
i heard that she's good
is that true?
like the starter character or doll: inferno?
inferno
Doll, the one you get in chapter 1, is trash
Doll inferno (gdoll) is like fine
gdoll is extremely strong at OE (1 copy + 7 dupes)
and she is kinda mid at E1
you can pull for her if you like her design, she's a solid character
sounds like a lot of investment
Yeah i don't recommend going all the way to OE
She is fine at E1+ though
so not that much investment to be usable
Main issue with her is that she brings less to the table than other support limited awakeners at E1, who are universally busted
people argue that you could get E1 clementine, or E1 thais, or E1 horla, etc.
I like her though <:Cheerup:1400771555939844149>
wait clem is good?
clem is one of the best supports in the game
flares is a fraud
oh
ohhh
lol
I heard him screaming real loud towards clem
yeah its a meme on his channel that clem is bad or something
but actually shes like, S tier
okay then I'll pick clem for a better future
117 posse skill remaining
do note that they fit into different comps
Doll: inferno (assuming you don't OE her) is an aliemus battery and poison stacker who throws out a little bit of healing, vuln, weakness
Clem gives a lot of STR and keyflare and has a unique effect on her exalt that is similar to vuln or weakness but stacks with the actual buff
So they fill slightly different niches
My main team right now is a Kathigu-Ra carry comp for example, Kath scales with STR and generates a lot of her own aliemus, so clem is an amazing teammate while gdoll doesnt do much for her
so basically any char that enjoy str rate (or something like that) is a good pair with clem?
yeah clem is the single best str buffer in the game
and "characters that enjoy str" are actually most of them lol
oh wow
she's versatile then
pretty much
like i said, s tier
